description: Multiple unspecified vulnerabilities in Oracle E-Business Suite and Applications 11.5.10CU2 have unknown impact and attack vectors related to (1) Application Object Library (APPS01), (2) Human Resources (APPS03), (3) Payables (APPS04), (4) Trading Community Architecture (APPS05), and (5) Web Applications Desktop Integrator (APPS06).
